overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long IREN Daily ETF (IREG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of IREN Limited (Nasdaq: IREN) stock, less fees, and expenses. IREN focuses on renewable-powered infrastructure for Bitcoin mining and high-performance computing. IREG was launched on Dec 16, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
